hero.subtext: Upload your sports photo. Choose your style. Get illustrated merch built for you — not a pro team.

transformation.headline: Your photo. Reimagined.
transformation.body: Send us a game photo. We turn it into premium illustrated art worthy of the athlete wearing it.

products.name: Sketch Series
products.desc: Loose line art, color pops, dynamic action poses.

products.name: Pixel Series
products.desc: Clean 8-bit portrait style. Nostalgic energy, premium execution.

products.name: Clean Series
products.desc: Minimalist silhouette, oversized number. Bold and refined.

editorial.headline: Pro merch. Finally for everyone else.
editorial.body: Upload your photo, pick your style, and get a custom illustrated jersey worthy of the athlete wearing it. Proof in 24 hours. Ships in 7–10 days.

testimonials.quote: My son lit up when he opened it. It looks like something an NBA player would have. Worth every penny.
testimonials.author: Sarah M., Basketball Mom

testimonials.quote: Ordered for the whole senior class. The bulk pricing made it easy and the kids are obsessed.
testimonials.author: Coach Daniels, Track & Field

testimonials.quote: The proof came back in less than a day and looked incredible. Approved it instantly.
testimonials.author: Marcus T., Football Dad
